name: KOP Limited
summary: KOP Limited, an investment holding company, operates as a real estate development and entertainment company. It operates through Real Estate Development and Investment, Real Estate Origination and Management Services, Hospitality, and Entertainment segments. The company invests in, develops, constructs, manages, and sells real estate properties. It is also involved in the properties acquisition and development conceptualization, construction management, and marketing and branding strategizing activities, as well as retail sale of projects; and development, management, and operation of hotels and resorts, including restaurants and spas. In addition, the company sells goods and tickets; and assigns distribution rights, as well as engages in the sponsorship, theatrical distribution, and concert promotions activities. Further, it is involved in business and management consultancy services; property management and consultancy activities; ownership and lease of real estate properties; investment management and consultancy activities; and operation of cafes and coffee houses. The company has operations in Singapore, Indonesia, and the People's Republic of China. KOP Limited was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in Singapore.
